title: Fizzcraft
body:
Fun Vanilla+ Modpack with some **MAGIC AND SPACE** thrown in!

With mods like Ad Astra, Better End, Better Nether, And Amethyst Imbuement(Coming Soon) see Minecraft like never before. Find new and interesting ways to slay your enemy's using magic, or see what is beyond the stars in your own rocket ship.


**Mod List**
___________________________________________________________________________________________________________________
